content_props.headline: Why DeckLee
content_props.subheadline: Decks as validated JSON, rendered for you

slides.speaker_notes: Set the frame: this is a pitch, keep it brisk.

content_props.left_body: Fight slide tools, copy-paste styles, redo it for every theme.
content_props.right_body: Describe the content once; swap themes with one field.

slides.speaker_notes: Make the contrast feel concrete and relatable.

content_props.quote: We cut deck production from a day to ten minutes.

slides.speaker_notes: Clear single call to action to close.
